hero.title: Local AI All-in-One Workbench
hero.subtitle:
AI Assistant, Multi-Agent orchestration, Investment Management, Knowledge Base, SOP Engine — all in one.
No server needed. ~10 MB install. Data stays local and secure.

features.title: Modular Architecture, Mix & Match
features.subtitle: Investment Management, Knowledge Base, SOP — three modules that work standalone or together.
features.row1_desc: Real-time dashboard showing deal funnel, pipeline distribution and recent activity. Kanban board with six stages from sourcing to closing, supporting drag-and-drop stage transitions.
features.row2_desc: Manage portfolio and tracked company profiles with industry classification and search filters. Link contacts to companies with role tags; centralized document archiving and retrieval.
features.row3_desc: Multi-dimensional deal scoring for quantified decisions. Customizable SOP templates with execution tracking. Audit-compliant logs, scheduled tasks and heartbeat rules for post-investment monitoring.

ai.title: AI Assistant + Multi-Agent Collaboration
ai.subtitle: Claw Assistant, Prospect-Research scientist cluster, ClawSwarm — three AI engines from single chat to multi-agent orchestration.
ai.assistant_title: Claw Assistant — Built-in AI Chat Engine
ai.assistant_desc: Streaming responses, Markdown rendering, multi-session management. Switch between models for industry analysis, Q&A, code assistance, system diagnostics and more.
ai.fleet_desc: Multi-instance AI Agent management with AI-powered creation and configuration. Model pool supports OpenAI, Anthropic, Deepseek and more. Real-time chat to verify agent status.
ai.evo_desc: Evolutionary-reasoning AI scientist system that auto-decomposes complex tasks and coordinates multiple Scientists. 12 built-in templates covering competitive analysis, code review, market sizing, tech evaluation and more.
ai.swarm_desc: Parallel multi-agent task orchestration — input a goal, AI auto-decomposes it into a DAG dependency graph, agents execute in parallel waves. 5 templates (deep research, due diligence, brainstorm, doc review, competitor monitoring) ready to use.

tutorials.title: Two Paths to Get Started
tutorials.subtitle: Each step tells you what to do, where to do it, and what success looks like. Download and begin.
tutorials.invest_desc: Follow this path to run through the full lead-to-approval flow.
tutorials.invest_s1_desc: Populate the dashboard with sample tasks and records so you can explore the full deal pipeline.
tutorials.invest_s2_desc: Enter a project name, industry and owner into the deal pool to get your first lead into the system.
tutorials.invest_s3_desc: Promote a promising project to a Deal and experience stage progression and to-do tracking.
tutorials.invest_s4_desc: Upload review materials to the document library so Deals and SOPs work from the same source.
tutorials.invest_s5_desc: Once materials are ready, push to approval and let the system handle reminders and decision logging.
tutorials.agent_desc: Five steps from freshly installed to your first working Agent.
tutorials.agent_s1_desc: Verify Node.js, OpenClaw CLI and config files are in place before proceeding.
tutorials.agent_s2_desc: Add at least one primary model so your Agent has reasoning capability.
tutorials.agent_s3_desc: Spin up your first Agent with its own identity, model and workspace.
tutorials.agent_s4_title: Feed Skills or Import a Persona
tutorials.agent_s4_desc: Confirm available Skills, or import a persona config from the AI Assistant page to personalize your Agent.
tutorials.agent_s5_desc: Send your first message in live chat and confirm the Agent responds correctly.

tech.title: Professional-Grade Tech Stack
tech.subtitle: Rust backend for security, Vanilla JS for speed, SQLite for privacy, OpenClaw for intelligence.
tech.tauri_desc: Rust backend + system WebView. ~10 MB installer, no bloated Electron runtime. Cross-platform: macOS, Windows, Linux.
tech.vite_desc: Zero framework dependencies, ultra-lightweight. Millisecond HMR with Vite, native CSS variable-driven theming.
tech.sqlite_desc: Data stays on your machine, secure and compliant. No server deployment needed — install and go. Meets financial-grade data compliance.
tech.openclaw_desc: In-house Agent framework supporting OpenAI, Anthropic, Deepseek and more. 4 operation modes, 8 built-in tools.

download.title: Download ProspectClaw Now
download.subtitle: ~10 MB installer, no extra runtime needed. Install and start working.
